title: Conflicting implementations of trait
explanation: This error occurs when there are two or more implementations of the same trait for the same type, or when a blanket implementation conflicts with a specific one. Rust requires that trait implementations be unambiguous.
error_message: error[E0119]: conflicting implementations of trait `Greet` for type `Person`

fixes.description: Use different types for different behavior

tip: This often happens with blanket implementations like impl<T: Display> ToString for T. Your specific impl conflicts with the blanket one.
